sentences.english: My grandparents live in the countryside.
My grandmother is a great cook and she always makes too much food.
sentences.korean: 할머니는 요리를 잘 하시고 항상 음식을 너무 많이 만드세요.

sentences.english: My grandfather likes to go fishing at the river near their house.
sentences.korean: 할아버지는 집 근처 강에서 낚시하는 걸 좋아하세요.

sentences.english: I always feel sad when it is time to go back home.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
